## 1. Subject of the Agreement

1.1. The Provider undertakes to provide the Client with software development and implementation services for sales automation (hereinafter referred to as "Services"), and the Client undertakes to accept and pay for said Services in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.

## 2. Payment Terms

2.1. The total cost of Services under this Agreement is EUR 30,000 (thirty thousand euros).

| Phase | Description | Amount | Due |
|-------|-------------|--------|-----|
| 1 | Advance payment (30%) | EUR 9,000 | Within 5 business days of signing |
| 2 | Interim payment (40%) | EUR 12,000 | Upon completion of development phase |
| 3 | Final payment (30%) | EUR 9,000 | Upon signing the acceptance certificate |

## 3. Confidentiality

3.1. The Parties undertake not to disclose confidential information obtained during the performance of this Agreement to third parties without the prior written consent of the other Party.
